description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a global before_script that starts ssh-agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates and secures the ~/.ssh directory, runs ssh-keyscan on $REMOTE_IP, and configures the Git user email to darth@empire.com and name to Darth Vader. In the test stage, add a test job that runs apk add --no-cache py-pip, pip install docker-compose, docker-compose up -d, and then ssh antil@$REMOTE_IP date. In the deploy stage, add a deploy job that runs ssh antil@$REMOTE_IP 'cd /containers/drupal-8-docker; git pull --no-edit; docker-compose up -d --build' to update the remote Drupal container.
